The '''Traffic Control Center''' was a multi-story data center located in the upper levels of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
Established in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] reign over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Located in one of the upper towers of the Palace, the Traffic Control Center was responsible for processing all in-system [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and planetary air-traffic that was head for the Palace.<ref name="JAS" />

==Layout==
A large facility located high in the Imperial Palace, the control center's central chamber featured a 40-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] wide [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] spherical grid displaying the location of any ships in [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] range that were en route to the Palace. Specialized traffic control [[Droid/Legends|droids]] processed ship information, while dozens of space-traffic controllers were stationed around the three-dimensional map to give ships safe-approach vectors.<ref name="JAS" />

==Sources==
